query:
INSERT INTO sms_templates (template_type, template_name, message, is_active) VALUES 
('admin_new_reservation', 'Admin New Reservation Alert', 'Boomiis New Reservation! {{customerName}} booked table for {{partySize}} guests on {{date}} at {{time}}. Check admin panel.', true),
('admin_catering_quote', 'Admin Catering Quote Request', 'Boomiis Catering Quote Request! {{customerName}} wants {{eventType}} for {{guestCount}} guests on {{eventDate}}. Check admin panel.', true)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE template_name=VALUES(template_name), message=VALUES(message);
